title: Youtube Poop: Be Careful When You Smoke Weed
description:
Wow, this video has not aged well in my opinion. I know it's unfunny, you don't need to comment saying so.

Another Youtube Poop. This time on Youtube Poop, Mario decides to help the Koopalings. Luigi is confused as to why... until Mario reveals that he smokes! He's stoned Luigi, you didn't make it.
